pve_actions.name: Dosis
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 300.
Additional Effect: Restores HP to targets under the effect of Kardion granted by you
Cure Potency: 170

pve_actions.name: Diagnosis
pve_actions.effect:
Restores target's HP.
Cure Potency: 450

pve_actions.name: Kardia
pve_actions.effect:
Grants self the effect of Kardia and a selected party member or self the effect of Kardion, restoring HP after landing certain magic attacks.
Cure Potency: 170

pve_actions.name: Prognosis
pve_actions.effect:
Restores own HP and the HP of all nearby party members.
Cure Potency: 300

pve_actions.name: Egeiro
pve_actions.effect: Resurrects target to a weakened state.

pve_actions.name: Physis
pve_actions.effect:
Gradually restores own HP and the HP of all nearby party members.
Cure Potency: 100
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Phlegma
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 400 for the first enemy, and 30% less for all remaining enemies.
Additional Effect: Restores HP to targets under the effect of Kardion granted by you
Cure Potency: 170
Maximum Charges: 2
Recast timer cannot be affected by status effects or gear attributes.

pve_actions.name: Eukrasia
pve_actions.effect:
Augments certain offensive and healing magic actions.
Dosis III is upgraded to Eukrasian Dosis III.
Dyskrasia II is upgraded to Eukrasian Dyskrasia.
Diagnosis is upgraded to Eukrasian Diagnosis.
Prognosis is upgraded to Eukrasian Prognosis II.
This action does not share a recast timer with any other actions. Upon execution, the recast timer for this action will be applied to all other weaponskills and magic actions.

pve_actions.name: Eukrasian Diagnosis
pve_actions.effect:
Restores target's HP.
Cure Potency: 300
Additional Effect: Erects a magicked barrier which nullifies damage equaling 180％ of the amount of HP restored. When critical HP is restored, also grants Differential Diagnosis, nullifying damage equaling 180% the amount of HP restored.
Duration: 30s
Effect cannot be stacked with Eukrasian Prognosis or scholar's Galvanize.
Can only be executed while under the effect of Eukrasia.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Diagnosis changes to Eukrasian Diagnosis when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Eukrasian Prognosis
pve_actions.effect:
Restores own HP and the HP of all nearby party members.
Cure Potency: 100
Additional Effect: Erects a magicked barrier which nullifies damage equaling 320% of the amount of HP restored
Duration: 30s
Effect cannot be stacked with those of Eukrasian Diagnosis or scholar's Galvanize.
Can only be executed while under the effect of Eukrasia.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Prognosis changes to Eukrasian Prognosis when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Eukrasian Dosis
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage over time.
Potency: 40
Duration: 30s
Additional Effect: Restores HP to targets under the effect of Kardion granted by you
Cure Potency: 170
Can only be executed while under the effect of Eukrasia.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Dosis changes to Eukrasian Dosis when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Soteria
pve_actions.effect:
Grants 4 stacks of Soteria, each stack increasing the cure potency of Kardion effects granted by you by 70%.
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Icarus
pve_actions.effect:
Rush to a targeted enemy's or party member's location.
Unable to cast if bound.

pve_actions.name: Druochole
pve_actions.effect:
Restores target's HP.
Cure Potency: 600
Additional Effect: Restores 7% of maximum MP
Addersgall Cost: 1

pve_actions.name: Dyskrasia
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 160 to all nearby enemies.
Additional Effect: Restores HP to targets under the effect of Kardion granted by you
Cure Potency: 170

pve_actions.name: Kerachole
pve_actions.effect:
Reduces damage taken by self and nearby party members by 10%.
Duration: 15s
Effect cannot be stacked with Taurochole.
Additional Effect: Regen
Cure Potency: 100
Duration: 15s
Additional Effect: Restores 7% of maximum MP
Addersgall Cost: 1

pve_actions.name: Ixochole
pve_actions.effect:
Restores own HP and the HP of all nearby party members.
Cure Potency: 400
Additional Effect: Restores 7% of maximum MP
Addersgall Cost: 1

pve_actions.name: Zoe
pve_actions.effect:
Increases healing magic potency of your next healing spell by 50%.
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Pepsis
pve_actions.effect:
Restores own HP and the HP of nearby party members by removing Eukrasian Diagnosis and Eukrasian Prognosis effects granted by you.
Eukrasian Diagnosis Cure Potency: 450
Eukrasian Prognosis Cure Potency: 350
Targets not under the effect of Eukrasian Diagnosis or Eukrasian Prognosis will not be healed.

pve_actions.name: Physis II
pve_actions.effect:
Gradually restores own HP and the HP of all nearby party members.
Cure Potency: 130
Duration: 15s
Additional Effect: Increases HP recovered by healing actions by 10%
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Taurochole
pve_actions.effect:
Restores own or target party member's HP.
Cure Potency: 700
Additional Effect: Reduces target's damage taken by 10%
Duration: 15s
Effect cannot be stacked with Kerachole.
Additional Effect: Restores 7% of maximum MP
Addersgall Cost: 1

pve_actions.name: Toxikon
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 300 for the first enemy, and 50% less for all remaining enemies.
Additional Effect: Restores HP to targets under the effect of Kardion granted by you
Cure Potency: 170
Addersting Cost: 1

pve_actions.name: Haima
pve_actions.effect:
Erects a magicked barrier around self or target party member that absorbs damage equivalent to a heal of 300 potency.
Additional Effect: Grants 5 stacks of Haimatinon
Duration: 15s
When the barrier is completely absorbed, a stack of Haimatinon is consumed and a new barrier is applied.
When the effect duration expires, a healing effect is then applied.
Cure Potency: 150 per remaining stack of Haimatinon

pve_actions.name: Dosis II
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 320.
Additional Effect: Restores HP to targets under the effect of Kardion granted by you
Cure Potency: 170

pve_actions.name: Phlegma II
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 490 for the first enemy, and 50% less for all remaining enemies.
Additional Effect: Restores HP to targets under the effect of Kardion granted by you
Cure Potency: 170
Maximum Charges: 2
Recast timer cannot be affected by status effects or gear attributes.

pve_actions.name: Eukrasian Dosis II
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage over time.
Potency: 60
Duration: 30s
Additional Effect: Restores HP to targets under the effect of Kardion granted by you
Cure Potency: 170
Can only be executed while under the effect of Eukrasia.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Dosis II changes to Eukrasian Dosis II when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Rhizomata
pve_actions.effect: Grants 1 stack of Addersgall.

pve_actions.name: Holos
pve_actions.effect:
Restores own HP and the HP of all nearby party members.
Cure Potency: 300
Additional Effect: Erects a magicked barrier which nullifies damage equaling the amount of HP restored
Duration: 30s
Additional Effect: Reduces damage taken by self and nearby party members by 10%
Duration: 20s

pve_actions.name: Panhaima
pve_actions.effect:
Erects a magicked barrier around self and all party members near you that absorbs damage equivalent to a heal of 200 potency.
Additional Effect: Grants 5 stacks of Panhaimatinon
Duration: 15s
When the barrier is completely absorbed, a stack of Panhaimatinon is consumed and a new barrier is applied.
When the effect duration expires, a healing effect is then applied.
Cure Potency: 100 per remaining stack of Panhaimatinon

pve_actions.name: Dosis III
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 380.
Additional Effect: Restores HP to targets under the effect of Kardion granted by you
Cure Potency: 170

pve_actions.name: Phlegma III
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 690 for the first enemy, and 50% less for all remaining enemies.
Additional Effect: Restores HP to targets under the effect of Kardion granted by you
Cure Potency: 170
Maximum Charges: 2
Recast timer cannot be affected by status effects or gear attributes.

pve_actions.name: Eukrasian Dosis III
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage over time.
Potency: 90
Duration: 30s
Effect cannot be stacked with Eukrasian Dyskrasia.
Additional Effect: Restores HP to targets under the effect of Kardion granted by you
Cure Potency: 170
Can only be executed while under the effect of Eukrasia.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Dosis III changes to Eukrasian Dosis III when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Dyskrasia II
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 170 to all nearby enemies.
Additional Effect: Restores HP to targets under the effect of Kardion granted by you
Cure Potency: 170

pve_actions.name: Eukrasian Dyskrasia
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage over time to all nearby enemies.
Potency: 40
Duration: 30s
Effect cannot be stacked with Eukrasian Dosis III.
Additional Effect: Restores HP to targets under the effect of Kardion granted by you
Cure Potency: 170
Can only be executed while under the effect of Eukrasia.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Dyskrasia II changes to Eukrasian Dyskrasia when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Toxikon II
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 380 for the first enemy, and 50% less for all remaining enemies.
Additional Effect: Restores HP to targets under the effect of Kardion granted by you
Cure Potency: 170
Addersting Cost: 1

pve_actions.name: Krasis
pve_actions.effect:
Increases HP recovery via healing actions for a party member or self by 20%.
Duration: 10s

pve_actions.name: Pneuma
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage to all enemies in a straight line before you with a potency of 380 for the first enemy, and 40% less for all remaining enemies.
Additional Effect: Restores own HP and the HP of all party members within a radius of 20 yalms
Cure Potency: 600
Additional Effect: Restores HP to targets under the effect of Kardion granted by you
Cure Potency: 170
Recast timer cannot be affected by status effects or gear attributes.

pve_actions.name: Psyche
pve_actions.effect: Deals unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 690 for the first enemy, and 50% less for all remaining enemies.

pve_actions.name: Eukrasian Prognosis II
pve_actions.effect:
Restores own HP and the HP of all nearby party members.
Cure Potency: 100
Additional Effect: Erects a magicked barrier which nullifies damage equaling 360% of the amount of HP restored
Duration: 30s
Effect cannot be stacked with those of Eukrasian Diagnosis or scholar's Galvanize.
Can only be executed while under the effect of Eukrasia.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Prognosis changes to Eukrasian Prognosis II when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Philosophia
pve_actions.effect:
Increases healing magic potency by 20%.
Duration: 20s
Additional Effect: Grants self and nearby party members the effect of Eudaimonia, restoring HP after landing spells
Cure Potency: 150
Duration: 20s

pve_actions.name: Repose
pve_actions.effect:
Afflicts target with Sleep.
Duration: 30s
Cancels auto-attack upon execution.

pve_actions.name: Esuna
pve_actions.effect: Removes a single detrimental effect from target.

pve_actions.name: Lucid Dreaming
pve_actions.effect:
Gradually restores own MP.
Potency: 55
Duration: 21s

pve_actions.name: Swiftcast
pve_actions.effect:
Next spell is cast immediately.
Duration: 10s

pve_actions.name: Surecast
pve_actions.effect:
Spells can be cast without interruption.
Additional Effect: Nullifies most knockback and draw-in effects
Duration: 6s

pve_actions.name: Rescue
pve_actions.effect: Instantly draws target party member to your side. Cannot be used outside of combat or when target is suffering from certain enfeeblements.

traits.name: Maim and Mend
traits.effect: Increases base action damage and HP restoration by 10%.

traits.name: Maim and Mend II
traits.effect: Increases base action damage and HP restoration by 30%.

traits.name: Addersgall
traits.effect:
Grants 1 stack of Addersgall automatically every twenty seconds.
Maximum Stacks: 3
Can be charged outside of combat.

traits.name: Somanoutic Oath
traits.effect: Increases the potency of Dosis to 250, Phlegma to 330, and Eukrasian Dosis to 35.

traits.name: Somanoutic Oath II
traits.effect: Increases the potency of Dosis to 300, Phlegma to 400, and Eukrasian Dosis to 40.

traits.name: Addersting
traits.effect:
Grants 1 stack of Addersting when the barrier granted by Eukrasian Diagnosis to any party member or the barrier granted by Eukrasian Prognosis to self is completely absorbed.
Maximum Stacks: 3

traits.name: Offensive Magic Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Dosis to Dosis II, Phlegma to Phlegma II, and Eukrasian Dosis to Eukrasian Dosis II. Also increases the potency of Toxikon to 300.

traits.name: Enhanced Kerachole
traits.effect: Adds an additional effect to Kerachole that grants healing over time.

traits.name: Offensive Magic Mastery II
traits.effect: Upgrades Dosis II to Dosis III, Phlegma II to Phlegma III, Eukrasian Dosis II to Eukrasian Dosis III, Dyskrasia to Dyskrasia II, and Toxikon to Toxikon II.

traits.name: Enhanced Healing Magic
traits.effect: Increases the healing potency of Diagnosis to 450 and Kardia to 170. Also increases the strength of barriers granted by Eukrasian Diagnosis to 180% the amount of HP restored, and Eukrasian Prognosis to 320% the amount of HP restored.

traits.name: Enhanced Zoe
traits.effect: Reduces Zoe recast time to 90 seconds.

traits.name: Enhanced Soteria
traits.effect: Reduces Soteria recast time to 60 seconds.

traits.name: Magick Mastery
traits.effect: Increases the potency of Dosis III to 380, Eukrasian Dosis III damage over time to 90, Toxikon II to 380, and Pneuma to 380.

traits.name: Eukrasian Prognosis Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Eukrasian Prognosis to Eukrasian Prognosis II.

traits.name: Enhanced Physis II
traits.effect: Extends the duration of the effect increasing HP recovered by healing actions to 15 seconds.

traits.name: Enhanced Swiftcast
traits.effect: Reduces Swiftcast recast time to 40 seconds.
